{{Quote|One male is dead, sire, and the other flees. Shall we pursue?|Chahis|<ref name="marvel64" />}}
'''Chahis''' was a [[Serp]] warrior from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Serphidi/Legends|Serphidi]] in the [[Belial system/Legends|Belial system]]. He worked in service to the planet's monarch [[King/Legends|King]] [[S'Shah]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Chahis and several other warriors noticed the ruins of a downed [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] on a mountain butte. Following the wreckage, Chahis and his fellows attacked a squad of Rebels as they disembarked their [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]], killing a pilot named [[Berl (Alliance)|Berl]] and taking [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Cinda Tarheel/Legends|Cinda Tarheel]] captive back to S'Shah.<ref name="marvel64" />

==Behind the scenes==
Chahis appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 64|''Star Wars'' (1977) 64]], written by [[David Michelinie]] and [[Michael Fleisher]], illustrated by [[Joe Brozowski]] and released in [[1982]].<ref name="marvel64" />
